inputs.label: Input Voltage
inputs.businessContext: The input voltage supplied to the divider.

businessContext_i18n.en: The input voltage supplied to the divider.
businessContext_i18n.es: El voltaje de entrada suministrado al divisor.

inputs.label: Resistance R1
inputs.businessContext: Resistance of the first resistor (connected to Vin).

businessContext_i18n.en: Resistance of the first resistor (connected to Vin).
businessContext_i18n.de: Widerstand des ersten Widerstands (verbunden mit Vin).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance de la première résistance (connectée à Vin).
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia de la primera resistencia (conectada a Vin).

inputs.label: Resistance R2
inputs.businessContext: Resistance of the second resistor (connected to ground).

businessContext_i18n.en: Resistance of the second resistor (connected to ground).
businessContext_i18n.de: Widerstand des zweiten Widerstands (verbunden mit Masse).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance de la deuxième résistance (connectée à la masse).
businessContext_i18n.es: Resistencia de la segunda resistencia (conectada a tierra).

inputs.label: Resistor Tolerance
inputs.businessContext: Resistor tolerance in percentage (e.g., ±1%, ±5%). Used to calculate worst-case output voltages.

businessContext_i18n.en: Resistor tolerance in percentage (e.g., ±1%, ±5%). Used to calculate worst-case output voltages.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Direnç toleransı yüzde olarak (örn. ±%1, ±%5). En kötü durum çıkış voltajlarını hesaplamak için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Widerstandstoleranz in Prozent (z. B. ±1 %, ±5 %). Wird zur Berechnung der Worst-Case-Ausgangsspannungen verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tolérance de la résistance en pourcentage (ex. ±1 %, ±5 %). Utilisée pour calculer les tensions de sortie dans le pire cas.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tolerancia de la resistencia en porcentaje (ej., ±1%, ±5%). Se utiliza para calcular los voltajes de salida en el peor caso.
businessContext_i18n.ar: تفاوت المقاوم بالنسبة المئوية (مثال: ±1%، ±5%). يُستخدم لحساب جهود الخرج في أسوأ الحالات

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
